visuals.title: Lecture Note: Motivation for Routh-Hurwitz
visuals.caption: The note introduces the denominator polynomial and asks how to detect unstable roots without explicit factorization.

visuals.title: Lecture Note: Same-Sign Coefficients Are Not Enough
visuals.caption: The counterexample shows that all-positive coefficients are necessary but not sufficient for stability.

visuals.title: Necessary vs Sufficient Thinking
visuals.description: Same-sign coefficients are a useful first filter, but the Routh test is the stronger condition.

visuals.title: Why the Denominator Is the Focus
visuals.description: The denominator determines poles, and poles determine stability.
